Equity Objectives: Increase or maintain the availability, affordability, and utilization of shared-bikes in the community
Performance Measures: Number of shared-bikes available, cost of shared-bikes available, number of registered bike share participants, or number, length, and duration of shared-bike trips* (*depends on data availability from shared-bikes providers)

Equity Objectives: Maintain or improve multimodal accessibility for affordable housing locations by 2025
Increase or maintain RPC staff participation in events for bike and pedestrian outreach and education, no less than 15 per year
Performance Measures: Number of bike and pedestrian outreach and education events with RPC staff participation

Equity Objectives: Maintain or increase number of discounted bus passes provided annually via the Community Foundation
Performance Measures: Number of monthly or annual discounted bus passes
